page_content:
Total Credits

1 DATA250 can be replaced by CMSC250 and (MATH240, MATH341 or MATH461)

2 DATA320 can be replaced by CMSC320

3 DATA400 can be replaced by STAT400, STAT410 or ENEE324

Course Prerequisite: MATH141 is a prerequisite for some of the courses in this program.

No more than 2 courses for the minor in Data Science may be taken at an institution other than the University of Maryland, College Park.

18
